reviews.review_msg: I truly enjoyed being in this class; I especially appreciated it when she got us timbits weekly! Her lectures involve discussing historical women and their heroinism, and I did write 3 essays and gained good feedback. For fairness, I would like her to prioritize letting someone who did not yet speak to share their point for in-class participation.

The most professional, caring and understanding professor I have ever met!! Lectures are entertaining, and engaging. She respects her students, the classroom environment is warm and welcoming. Would def take her class again.
